name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI-powered code completion that helps you write code faster with intelligent suggestions.

name: Prettier
description: Opinionated code formatter that enforces a consistent style across your entire codebase.

name: ESLint
description: Integrates ESLint into VS Code to find and fix problems in your JavaScript code.

name: Docker
description: Build, manage, and deploy containerized applications right from VS Code.

name: GitLens
description: Supercharge Git within VS Code with blame annotations, code lens, and powerful comparison commands.

name: IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate
description: Professional IDE for JVM development with advanced refactoring and code analysis.

name: Tabnine AI
description: AI assistant that learns your coding patterns to provide personalized completions.

name: Rainbow Brackets
description: Colorize matching brackets for better code readability in complex nested structures.

name: Material Theme UI
description: Beautiful Material Design theme with customizable color schemes for your IDE.

name: Database Tools
description: Advanced database management and SQL development tools integrated into your IDE.

name: Unreal Insights
description: Performance profiling and analysis tool for Unreal Engine projects.

name: Blutility
description: Editor utility blueprints for automating repetitive tasks in Unreal Engine.

name: React DevTools
description: Inspect React component hierarchies, props, and state directly in your browser.

name: Redux DevTools
description: Time-travel debugging and state inspection for Redux applications.

name: Wappalyzer
description: Identify technologies used on websites including frameworks, analytics, and CMS.

name: ColorZilla
description: Advanced eyedropper, color picker, gradient generator and color analyzer.

name: JSON Viewer
description: Beautiful JSON visualization with syntax highlighting and tree navigation.

name: Live Server
description: Launch a local development server with live reload feature for static and dynamic pages.

name: Thunder Client
description: Lightweight REST API client for testing APIs directly inside VS Code.

name: Code Runner
description: Run code snippets or entire files for multiple languages with a single click.
